name: Santa's Christmas Solitaire 3
short_description: Santa's Christmas Solitaire 3 offers a new festive story, unique game modes, and a Christmas shop to aid Santa’s quest
detailed_description:
Santa's Christmas Solitaire 3 invites you into a festive holiday adventure with a brand-new story and multiple game modes. Immerse yourself in a beautifully themed Christmas experience, where you can play solitaire with a holiday twist. Explore the Christmas shop, where you can purchase delightful items to help you on your journey and assist Santa in his magical quest. Enjoy hours of engaging gameplay with various challenges and festive surprises. With stunning graphics and a joyful atmosphere, Santa's Christmas Solitaire 3 the perfect way to celebrate the season and immerse yourself in the spirit of Christmas!

Features

  • The third installment in our beloved Santa's Christmas Solitaire series

  • Enjoy a brand-new festive story with full voice-over for a magical Christmas experience

  • Choose from 4 difficulty levels to match your skill and experience

  • Engage in 3 fun game modes: One Up One Down, Match 2, Make 14, with an added surprise Random Game Mode!

  • Enjoy a collection of entertaining mini-games, including Slots, Match 3, Jigsaw, Blackjack, Higher or Lower, and Find the Object.

  • Elevate your Christmas spirit with dazzling festive backgrounds that bring Christmas to life

  • Uncover festive objects in the Hidden Object sections this Christmas

  • A Christmas store brimming with magical items for your festive journey

  • Enjoy 240 festive card levels to challenge your skills this Christmas

  • All levels are Mega levels

  • Get into the Christmas spirit with the festive music

  • Customize your experience with a large variety of Christmas-themed card designs
